bead.title: migrate execute_bead.go to git.Command
bead.description: Split from timed-out ddx-65b88ae1. Migrate the 21 bare git exec callsites in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go to cli/internal/git.Command. Replace 'exec.CommandContext(ctx, "git", args...)' (and any 'exec.Command("git", args...)') with 'git.Command(ctx, dir, args...)' where dir is the original cmd.Dir (or -C target). Import "github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/git".
bead.acceptance: grep on execute_bead.go returns no bare git exec.Command matches. All existing *_test.go files in cli/internal/agent/ pass. Build green.
